Hello Connections,

Greetings from Configusa,

Job Title: Sr. SAP Business Analyst

Location: San Jose CA(Onsite)

Duration: 6+months

Job Description:

As an SAP Business Analyst, Facilitates and leads SAP cross functional team of business owners, product management, software development, system architects, SQA and other key stakeholders to translate Business Requirements into effective Systems Solution.

Should have experience in SAP Functionalities OTC, FI, MM and SAP Enterprise Projects and other enterprise applications areas – Salesforce, CPQ and other integrations.

Evaluate business processes/systems and lead solution definition (workflow, technology, data, etc.) to support business goals and initiatives.

Manage changes to the solution requirements, assessing the impact of requirement changes, and ensuring appropriate approval of those changes.

Quickly understands business problems and opportunities in the context of the requirements, systems capabilities, and presents solution options.

Manage solution requirement communication, ensuring that stakeholders have a shared understanding of the requirements.

Work collaboratively with stakeholders to identify project objectives, scope, dependencies and risks for projects.

Participate in User Acceptance Testing, to ensure solution provided meets the business acceptance.

please share resumes to vipula.p@configusa.com

Independent C2C Rate: $65/hr

Job Summary

We are seeking an experienced Salesforce Business Systems Analyst with strong expertise in Revenue Cloud Advanced (RCA) to support business transformation initiatives across Quote-to-Cash (QTC) processes. The ideal candidate will collaborate with business stakeholders, product owners, architects, and development teams to gather requirements, analyze business processes, and deliver scalable Salesforce Revenue Cloud solutions.

The candidate should have deep knowledge of Salesforce Revenue Cloud Advanced capabilities, subscription management, pricing, quoting, contract lifecycle management, order management, and billing integrations.

Key Responsibilities

Business Analysis & Requirements Gathering

Partner with business stakeholders to understand business objectives and translate them into functional requirements.

Conduct workshops, discovery sessions, and stakeholder interviews.

Create and maintain:

Business Requirement Documents (BRDs)

Functional Requirement Documents (FRDs)

User Stories

Process Flow Diagrams

Gap Analysis Documentation

Facilitate requirement validation and sign-off sessions.

Salesforce Revenue Cloud Advanced (RCA)

Required Qualifications

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Business, or related field.

8+ years of Business Systems Analyst experience.

5+ years of Salesforce ecosystem experience.

3+ years of hands-on experience with Salesforce Revenue Cloud Advanced (RCA).

Strong experience in Quote-to-Cash (QTC) processes.

Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments.

Strong requirement gathering and stakeholder management skills.

Experience creating BRDs, FRDs, User Stories, and Process Flows.

Required Salesforce Skills

Salesforce Platform

Salesforce Sales Cloud

Salesforce Service Cloud

Salesforce Platform Configuration

Flow Automation

Approval Processes

Reports & Dashboards

Revenue Cloud Advanced (Must Have)

Product Catalog

Preferred Qualifications

Salesforce Administrator Certification

Salesforce Business Analyst Certification

Salesforce Revenue Cloud Certification (preferred)

Salesforce CPQ experience

Experience in SaaS/subscription-based business models

Experience supporting enterprise-scale Salesforce implementations

Must-Have Skills Summary

Salesforce Business Analyst – 8+ years

Salesforce Revenue Cloud Advanced (RCA) – 3+ years

Quote-to-Cash (QTC) expertise

Product Catalog & Pricing Configuration

Subscription Management

Contract Lifecycle Management

Order Management

Agile/Scrum methodology

UAT & Testing coordination

Strong stakeholder communication

Role: AS400 Developer

Location : Issaquah, WA (Hybrid )

Please Share Resumes to Manoj.chintamalla@datacapitalinc.com

We are  seeking an experienced AS400/iSeries Developer to support application development and production support for a leading wholesale retail client. The role involves designing, developing, enhancing, and maintaining AS400 applications while collaborating with business analysts, QA teams, and stakeholders to deliver high-quality solutions.

Key Responsibilities :

Analyze, develop, and enhance AS400/iSeries applications using RPG, RPGLE, SQLRPGLE, and CLP/CLLE.

Create and maintain functional specifications, technical documentation, and data mapping documents.

Develop and optimize SQL queries, stored procedures, and database objects.

Perform code reviews, unit testing, debugging, and production support.

Collaborate with business teams, product owners, and QA to define and deliver requirements.

Support incident resolution, knowledge base creation, and on-call activities.

Participate in deployment, release planning, and adherence to development standards.

Required Skills & Experience :

8+ years of experience in AS400/iSeries development.

3+ years of experience in RPGLE and SQL programming.

Strong expertise in RPG, RPG ILE, SQLRPGLE, CLP/CLLE.

Experience with DB2/iSeries databases, Physical Files, Logical Files, SQL Tables, Views, Indexes, and Stored Procedures.

Knowledge of Display Files, Subfiles, and Printer Files.

Experience with ILE concepts, Service Programs, Binding Directories, and Modules.

Hands-on experience with MQ, MQ Triggers, and XML integration in RPG programs.

Strong SQL skills, including embedded SQL, cursor programming, and query optimization.

Excellent communication and client-facing skills.

Preferred Skills

Experience with Turnover/MDCMS, X-Analysis, and ROBOT Scheduler.

Knowledge of iSeries Navigator and SQL performance tuning.

Understanding of messaging, triggers, and inter-system communication.

Retail domain experience (Merchandising, Warehouse Management, Distribution, etc.) is a plus.
